ModuleTitle.helper: Internal/admin-facing title for this content block. This is not shown to website visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional section heading shown above the FAQ list.

IntroText.placeholder: Use this optional intro to briefly explain the questions below.
IntroText.helper: Optional short introduction shown below the heading.

FAQs.helper: Required. Add one item per frequently asked question.

Question.placeholder: What do I bring for a forest session?
Question.helper: Required. Keep the question clear and easy to scan.

Answer.helper: Required. This answer is rendered exactly as entered.

FooterMessage.placeholder: Still have questions? We would be happy to help.
FooterMessage.helper: Optional small message shown centered below the FAQ items.
